nodes.label: audio-engine.js
nodes.description: Audio context init, Web Audio API setup (analyser, gain), volume controls, fade in/out, UI sound effects

nodes.label: initAudio()
nodes.description: Creates AudioContext, connects source->analyser->beatAnalyser->gainNode->destination

nodes.label: resumeAudioAnalysis()
nodes.description: Resumes suspended AudioContext

nodes.label: fadeOutAndPauseAudio()
nodes.description: Ramps gain to 0 over AUDIO_FADE_OUT_MS, then pauses HTMLAudioElement

nodes.label: applyVolumeToAudio()
nodes.description: Syncs targetVolume to gainNode and audio element volume

nodes.label: setVolume(value, silent)
nodes.description: Sets target volume, persists to localStorage, updates UI

nodes.label: bindVolumeControls()
nodes.description: Binds volume slider, button events, mouse hover panel open/close

nodes.label: rampAudioOutputGain(value, durationMs)
nodes.description: Smooth gain ramp using AudioParam linearRampToValueAtTime or requestAnimationFrame fallback

nodes.label: audioCtx
nodes.description: Web Audio API AudioContext instance

nodes.label: analyser
nodes.description: Primary AnalyserNode for FFT audio visualization

nodes.label: gainNode
nodes.description: GainNode for volume control

nodes.label: targetVolume
nodes.description: Current target volume (0-1)

nodes.label: beat-analysis.js
nodes.description: Offline beat detection using frequency band energy analysis, MusicTempo library via Web Worker, disk caching

nodes.label: analyzeAudioBeats(audioUrl, durationSec, token, options)
nodes.description: Main offline beat analysis: fetches audio, decodes, filters into 4 bands, detects onset peaks, produces beat map with strength/confidence/primary/camera flags

nodes.label: beatMapSongKey(song)
nodes.description: Generates unique key for song beat map (local/qq/song prefix)

nodes.label: scheduleBeatAnalysis(songId, audioUrl, token, song)
nodes.description: Schedules delayed beat analysis after playback starts with idle timeout and disk cache check

nodes.label: scheduleQueueBeatPrefetch(fromIdx, delayMs, state)
nodes.description: Prefetches beat maps for upcoming queue items in background

nodes.label: analyzeMusicTempoInWorker(buffer, token)
nodes.description: Runs MusicTempo analysis in a Web Worker for BPM detection

nodes.label: readBeatDiskCache(key)
nodes.description: Reads beat map from server-side disk cache

nodes.label: writeBeatDiskCache(key, map, song, mode)
nodes.description: Writes beat map to server-side disk cache

nodes.label: beatMapCache
nodes.description: In-memory cache for beat maps keyed by beatMapSongKey

nodes.label: beatMapToken
nodes.description: Token incremented on each track switch to cancel stale analysis

nodes.label: currentBeatMap
nodes.description: Active beat map for the currently playing song (declared in index.html, written by playback.js)

nodes.label: playback.js
nodes.description: Core playback queue controller: play at index, next/prev, toggle play, shuffle, queue management, auto-fallback, glass effect controls

nodes.label: playQueueAt(idx, opts)
nodes.description: Central playback function: sets up audio, handles quality/SVIP, beat analysis scheduling, lyric fetch, cross-platform source fallback (netease/qq/youtube)

nodes.label: togglePlay()
nodes.description: Toggle play/pause with fade transitions, YT URL expiry retry

nodes.label: nextTrack()
nodes.description: Advances to next track (shuffle or sequential)

nodes.label: prevTrack()
nodes.description: Goes to previous track

nodes.label: queueSong(song, opts)
nodes.description: Adds song to play queue (end or next position), deduplicates

nodes.label: shuffleQueue()
nodes.description: Fisher-Yates shuffle of playQueue

nodes.label: tryAutoPlaybackFallback(song, data, idx, token, opts)
nodes.description: When a song fails to play, searches alternate platform (netease<->qq) for same title+artist

nodes.label: skipFailedQueueItem(idx, token, message)
nodes.description: Marks item as failed and skips to next playable queue item

nodes.label: safePlaybackStep(label, fn)
nodes.description: Wraps playback setup step in try/catch for resilience

nodes.label: bindPlayerControlAnimations()
nodes.description: Binds GSAP hover/press/release animations to all bottom-bar control buttons

nodes.label: queueItemKey(song)
nodes.description: Unique key for a song in the queue (qq/song/local/podcast prefix)

nodes.label: playQueue
nodes.description: Global play queue array (defined in index.html)

nodes.label: currentIdx
nodes.description: Global index into playQueue (defined in index.html)

nodes.label: lyrics.js
nodes.description: Lyric fetching, parsing (LRC/YRC), rendering trigger, source cycling, offset/speed adjustment, mini source bar

nodes.label: fetchLyric(songOrId, token, preferSource)
nodes.description: Fetches lyrics from API with caching, parses YRC/LRC, applies preferred source

nodes.label: renderLyrics()
nodes.description: Triggers clearStageLyrics() - actual rendering done by stageLyrics in three-lyrics.js

nodes.label: toggleLyricsPanel(force)
nodes.description: Toggles particleLyrics FX flag, creates or clears lyrics particles

nodes.label: cycleLyricSource()
nodes.description: Cycles through lyric sources (lrclib/music-kit/netease/kugou/yt-captions) for YT songs

nodes.label: setLyricSource(source)
nodes.description: Sets specific lyric source by name

nodes.label: adjustLyricOffset(delta)
nodes.description: Adjusts lyric sync offset (+/- seconds), saves per-song preference

nodes.label: adjustPlaybackSpeed(delta)
nodes.description: Changes audio playback rate (0.25x-3x), saves per-song preference

nodes.label: updateMiniSourceBar()
nodes.description: Shows/hides mini source bar based on current song provider

nodes.label: updateMiniSourceButtons()
nodes.description: Updates active state of mini source buttons

nodes.label: parseYrcText(text)
nodes.description: Parses YRC (Yun) lyrics format with word-level timing

nodes.label: parseLyricText(text)
nodes.description: Parses standard LRC lyrics format

nodes.label: lyricsLines
nodes.description: Current active lyric lines (defined in index.html)

nodes.label: lyricsTimingSource
nodes.description: Source type of current lyrics (yrc-word/yrc-line/lrc-line/fallback/custom-lrc/custom-text)

nodes.label: lyricSourceMode
nodes.description: Current lyric mode: 'original' or 'custom'

nodes.label: playbackProviderLabel(song)
nodes.description: Returns display name for playback provider (YouTube/QQ音乐/网易云)

nodes.label: alternatePlaybackProvider(song)
nodes.description: Returns the opposite provider for auto-fallback (netease<->qq)

nodes.label: searchAlternatePlatformSong(song)
nodes.description: Searches for same song on alternate platform via apiJson
